# TASKS.md — Priority Queue
# Updated: 2026-04-07

## 📏 WORK SIZING
- **Tiny (< 30 min):** "Do it now." Simple scripts, fixes, config.
- **Small (1-2 hours):** "Batch these." Scrapers, single feature adds, API hookups.
- **Medium (1-2 days):** "Dedicated session." Multi-agent flows, new products (e.g., ContextClaw).
- **Large (Multi-day):** "Strategic project." Math research, heavy architecture (e.g., Hilbert Space v2).

## 🟢 TINY (<30 min — do now)
- [x] Fix hardcoded Quiver API key (moved to .env) ✅ 2026-04-07
- [ ] Publish first Substack post (SignalPulse — 3 posts ready)
- [ ] Create Stripe payment link for $997 AI Readiness Audit

## 🟡 SMALL (1-2 hours — batch these)
- [ ] **Apply to free credit programs** — Drafts ready at `outputs/free-credits-applications.md`. Priority: Claude OSS → Anthropic Startup → Azure → Google → AWS. ~$30K+ addressable.
- [ ] **ICE/PIE Chunking Fix** — Hard 24KB chunk cap for session extraction. Prevents free models from choking on large corpus dumps. Architecture: `memory/active/icepie-chunking-fix.md`. The real fix for reliable autonomous knowledge extraction.
- [ ] **Dev signal scraper crons** — GitHub stars/forks/issues, ClawhHub skill installs, Moltbook activity. Design signal spec, create cron jobs on free models.
- [ ] Email open/reply tracking — 4+ weeks overdue
- [ ] BobLead bounce rate fix — 12%+ (target <2%)
- [ ] Reflist "Buy Your Referral Website" — $9.99-29.99 product page
- [ ] GSC sitemaps — all Vercel sites
- [ ] Barbershop/booking vertical pitch page
- [ ] Content scheduling — Medium (5 drafts queued), LinkedIn positioning
- [ ] **Daily Medium articles** — DAILY cadence (not monthly). Written for complete noobs. See article queue below.
- [ ] **Rewrite existing articles for beginners** — All articles need noob-friendly tone: explain DO, explain LLM vs ChatGPT, explain cloud compute, etc.
- [ ] **DeepSeek reasoning outsourcing** — Practice delegating reasoning (not coding) tasks to deepseek-reasoner ($0.55/M in, $2.19/M out). Key: `sk-e7a...049`
- [ ] **Vision model preprocessing for browser** — Gemma 4 / LongCat-Next as ContextClaw enhancement. Screenshot → semantic text (500 tokens) instead of DOM (200K tokens)

## 🟠 MEDIUM (1-2 days — dedicated session)
- [ ] **Rust AI Browser / WebClaw (MCP)** — Fast browser automation for AI agents. We already have Lightpanda installed (Zig, 11x faster than Chrome, CDP+MCP modes) + stealth-browser-mcp evaluated. Build: Rust MCP server wrapping Lightpanda → DOM→clean-markdown pipeline → cookie/login persistence → optional RAG index. Subsumes WebClaw PRD (Option A: general AI crawler). Full concept: `memory/active/rust-ai-browser.md`. Prior art also: Domscribe MCP, Vercel Agent Browser.
- [ ] 🔥🔥 **AI Trading Agents Hackathon** — $55K, APR 12 (5 days). Package MktPeek as ERC-8004/Kraken CLI.
- [ ] **Skip $10K Grant** — APR 17
- [ ] **DO Hatch program application** — Up to $100K credits + 3 months free GPU. Draft at `outputs/free-credits-applications.md`
- [ ] **TDX Hackathon** (Salesforce) — APR 15-16
- [ ] Side hustle incubator — landing page + pitch (Dylan = proof case)
- [ ] MktPeek entity-asset map — expand 15 → 50+ tickers
- [ ] MktPeek signal inversion — paper trader running, learning system grading
- [ ] Barbershop lead finder — booking page quality scoring + scraper

## 🔴 LARGE (multi-day — strategic)
- [ ] **YC S26** — MAY 4 deadline
- [ ] ContextClaw → open source launch (Anthropic essay ready, Show HN ready)
- [ ] TurfRank → GSC sitemap submission as service feature

## ✅ DONE

- [x] FreshFlax, ClawNet, Petal & Stem, Comfort & Co sites

## DEFERRED

- Frank Mariscal — HVAC Dallas. Email sent, waiting for reply.
